messages.content: write an email to apologize to my manager for asking for meeting with the P&O head of Novartis, I realize that it was a mistake to take action to talk directly to the p&o head novartis, since I started I receive a lot of pressure for the local production site in huningue, and as a professional I want make sure that I reach their expectation, I understand that with the holidays it's easy from you guys to take action. I just wanted to apologize again, and let you know that I completely understand that you have my back and that there is process to follow if anything needs to be flagged. The very good news is that during my training with Brassring, Nina asked me a bit more about my current responsibility and she agreed to align herself with the P&O head to clarify the responsibilities

Subject: Apology for requesting a meeting with the P&O Head of Novartis

Dear [Manager's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to apologize for taking action without consulting you first. I now realize that it was a mistake to directly request a meeting with the P&O Head of Novartis.

Ever since I joined the team, I have been under a lot of pressure to ensure the success of the local production site in Huningue. As a dedicated professional, I want to make sure that I meet and exceed everyone's expectations. However, I understand that as the holiday season approaches, it may be easy for you and the team to feel overwhelmed with additional responsibilities.

I sincerely apologize once again for not following the established process and for not considering the impact it may have had on you and the team. I appreciate your understanding and ongoing support. I am fully aware that you have my back and that there is a proper process in place for any issues or concerns that need to be addressed.

On a positive note, I wanted to share some good news with you. During my training with Brassring, I had the opportunity to discuss my responsibilities with Nina. She showed interest in understanding my role better and agreed to align herself with the P&O Head to clarify the respective responsibilities. It seems that this situation may naturally resolve itself over time.

Once again, I deeply regret any inconvenience or confusion caused by my actions. I am committed to being more vigilant and following the appropriate channels in the future.

Thank you for your understanding and ongoing guidance. I truly appreciate your support and am determined to contribute positively to the team's success.

Wishing you a joyful holiday season and a prosperous New Year ahead.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

I completely understand that you have my back and that there is process to follow if anything needs to be flagged. Subject: Reiterating my sincere apology for the request to meet with the P&O Head of Novartis

Dear [Manager's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out once again to express my deepest apologies for my previous action of directly requesting a meeting with the P&O Head of Novartis. I now fully understand that it was a mistake and should have consulted you before taking any such action.

Ever since joining the team, I have been facing significant pressure to ensure the success of the local production site in Huningue. As a dedicated professional, I am committed to meeting and exceeding the expectations placed upon me. However, I now realize that with the upcoming holiday season, it can be especially challenging for you and the team to manage additional responsibilities and promptly address client-related matters. I deeply regret not taking this into account earlier.

I want to assure you that I completely understand and acknowledge the importance of thoroughly preparing before communicating with clients. It was wrong of me to attempt to reach out to the P&O Head without following the established process for flagging any concerns or issues. I am grateful for your unwavering support and understanding regarding this matter.

On a positive note, I would like to share some encouraging news. During my recent training with Brassring, I had the opportunity to discuss my current responsibilities with Nina. She showed interest in gaining a better understanding of my role and agreed to align herself with the P&O Head to clarify respective responsibilities. This discussion has given me hope that the situation will naturally resolve itself over time.

Once again, I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience or confusion caused by my actions. I assure you that I have learned from this experience and will be more vigilant in following the appropriate channels in the future.

Thank you for your continued guidance and support. I genuinely appreciate your strong belief in me and remain committed to contributing positively to the team's success.

Wishing you a joyful holiday season filled with peace and happiness.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
make it the same including that you can be confident in relying on me to assure to success of our partnership with novartis

Subject: Reiterating my sincere apology and reaffirming my commitment to the success of our partnership with Novartis

Dear [Manager's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out once again to express my deepest apologies for my previous action of directly requesting a meeting with the P&O Head of Novartis. I now fully understand that it was a mistake and should have consulted you before taking any such action.

Ever since joining the team, I have been facing significant pressure to ensure the success of the local production site in Huningue. As a dedicated professional, I am committed to meeting and exceeding the expectations placed upon me. However, I now realize that with the upcoming holiday season, it can be especially challenging for you and the team to manage additional responsibilities and promptly address client-related matters. I deeply regret not taking this into account earlier.

I want to assure you that I completely understand and acknowledge the importance of thoroughly preparing before communicating with clients. It was wrong of me to attempt to reach out to the P&O Head without following the established process for flagging any concerns or issues. I am grateful for your unwavering support and understanding regarding this matter.

On a positive note, I would like to share some encouraging news. During my recent training with Brassring, I had the opportunity to discuss my current responsibilities with Nina. She showed interest in gaining a better understanding of my role and agreed to align herself with the P&O Head to clarify respective responsibilities. This discussion has given me hope that the situation will naturally resolve itself over time.

Once again, I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience or confusion caused by my actions. I assure you that I have learned from this experience and will be more vigilant in following the appropriate channels in the future.

Furthermore, I want to take this opportunity to reaffirm my commitment to the success of our partnership with Novartis. You can be confident in relying on me to ensure that we meet and exceed their expectations. I will give my utmost dedication to the local production site in Huningue and work closely with the team to achieve our goals.

Thank you for your continued guidance and support. I genuinely appreciate your strong belief in me and remain committed to contributing positively to the team's success.

Wishing you a joyful holiday season filled with peace and happiness.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
make it shorter

Subject: My sincere apology and commitment to our partnership with Novartis

Dear [Manager's Name],

I sincerely apologize once again for my previous mistake of directly requesting a meeting with the P&O Head of Novartis without consulting you. I realize now that it was an error in judgement.

I understand the pressures we are facing with the local production site in Huningue, and I am fully committed to meeting and exceeding expectations. I acknowledge the importance of following the established process and will ensure to do so in the future.

On a positive note, during my training with Brassring, I had a productive discussion with Nina about my responsibilities. She expressed interest in clarifying roles with the P&O Head, which is a promising development.

I apologize for any inconvenience or confusion caused by my actions. I have learned from this experience and will be more vigilant in adhering to proper channels.

Thank you for your ongoing guidance and support. I am devoted to the success of our partnership with Novartis and will work diligently to meet their expectations.

Wishing you a joyful holiday season.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Enhanced Presentation for LinkedIn Profile:

Accomplished Talent Acquisition Partner with over 8 years of experience and a proven track record of developing and implementing strategic talent acquisition strategies across the Pharmaceutical, Biotech, Medical Devices, Diagnostics, and IT sectors. I have successfully sourced and recruited senior-level talent across global locations, ensuring a strong and diverse talent pipeline.

I excel in building authentic relationships and establishing trust with individuals at all levels within an organization. My influencing skills allow me to effectively partner with stakeholders, enabling successful talent acquisition outcomes. I possess excellent talent assessment and interviewing skills, resulting in hiring the best-fit candidates for the organization's needs.

With a strong understanding of technology, I have successfully utilized talent acquisition systems such as WorkDay (Applicant Tracking), Candidate Relationship Management platforms, social media, and predictive tools. This enables me to effectively navigate the digital landscape to attract top talent.

I possess an analytical mindset and the ability to synthesize ad hoc market intelligence data. This allows me to provide valuable information on talent market trends, threats, and opportunities to shape business strategies.

I have a proven ability to work collaboratively across multiple leadership areas, global teams, and networks in a volatile, uncertain, complex, and ambiguous (VUCA) environment. My people leadership experience, including direct management and mentoring, has enabled me to foster a high-performing team and drive successful talent acquisition outcomes.

Additionally, I have experience presenting to senior leadership at the VP+ levels, articulating talent acquisition strategies and providing insights to drive business success.

Fluent in both French and English, I possess strong communication skills in both languages, facilitating effective collaboration with diverse teams.

Let's connect and explore how I can contribute to your talent acquisition and organizational growth efforts!

*Note: Remember to add your name and contact information at the end for completeness.

make a bullet presentation of this job for my CV: Senior Talent Acquisition Partner EMEA Pharmaceutical Roche Holding AG

- Senior Talent Acquisition Partner at Roche Holding AG, specializing in the EMEA region in the pharmaceutical industry
- Proven track record in developing and implementing talent acquisition strategies
- Expertise in sourcing and recruiting top talent for various positions across the organization
- Successfully filled senior-level roles across multiple global locations
- Skilled in building authentic relationships and establishing trust with stakeholders
- Proficient in utilizing talent acquisition systems, including Applicant Tracking (WorkDay) and Candidate Relationship Management platforms
- Strong understanding of the pharmaceutical industry and talent market trends
- Collaborative approach, working effectively across global teams and networks
- Fluent in English (additional language proficiency)
do the same for this job: Senior Recruiter / Talent Acquisition Business Partner (NOVARTIS AG, CH) production site

- Senior Recruiter / Talent Acquisition Business Partner at NOVARTIS AG, specializing in the production site
- Responsible for full-cycle recruiting and talent acquisition strategies specifically targeted to the production site
- Proven track record of successfully sourcing and attracting top talent for various positions within the organization
- Strong understanding of the production industry and related roles and responsibilities
- Collaborate with hiring managers to understand staffing needs and develop tailored recruitment strategies
- Utilize talent acquisition systems and tools to effectively manage and track candidate pipelines
- Conduct thorough candidate assessments and interviews to ensure selection of the best-fit candidates
- Build strong partnerships and establish trust with stakeholders at all levels of the organization
- Fluent in [relevant languages] to effectively communicate with candidates and teams
- Stay updated on industry trends and best practices to continuously improve recruitment processes
do the same for this job title : Account Strategist EMEA for google ads

- Responsible for developing and executing strategic advertising campaigns for clients
- Collaborate with clients to understand their business goals and objectives
- Design customized advertising solutions to drive maximum ROI and client success
- Conduct data analysis to identify opportunities and optimize campaign performance
- Provide strategic recommendations to enhance advertising strategies and achieve client objectives
- Act as a trusted advisor, building long-term relationships with clients
- Stay updated on industry trends and Google Ads products to offer cutting-edge solutions
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless campaign execution
- Fluent in [relevant languages] to effectively communicate with clients and stakeholders.
- Proven track record of delivering exceptional results and exceeding client expectations.
